content:
Hi! I've been playing Morimens for about a month now on both Steam and mobile (Android), and even logged in on my phone successfully this morning after the update - about 7 hours ago, as seen in the screenshot. However now it seems to have logged me out on my mobile, and is saying when I try to log in that the game isn't available in my region.

I'm in the UK and I've been playing for weeks without issue, so I'm a bit confused. I uninstalled and reinstalled, but it's still giving me the same message when I try to login with Steam.

I'll have a try on my PC later but I won't get home for another 3 hours. I do have Moonphase Vigil active so I hope it isn't a long term issue.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Mobile login via Steam failed - "the game is not available in your region"

content:
Hey all,

The past few DTides (regional zone effects), the jump in health and difficulty from Alert 3 to Alert 4 is really high.

The game is kinda getting boring. 

There are a few of us players that think we don't even need to think on Alert 3 and can easily clear it. 

But then Alert 4 jump in health (especially for bosses) is so big that we can't clear it.

So we are in this zone where A3 is way too easy and A4 is way too hard. 

Please fix this! Because we are losing fun for playing the game being in this, boring zone.
I will post what I found so far.
